description: Mandatory egress gateway: redacts PII before every Anthropic call; re-identifies on response.

required.name: VS_KEK
required.doc: AES-256-GCM master key, 32 random bytes base64-encoded. Generate ONCE per appliance and add to /opt/vibe/env/appliance.env: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('base64'))". Loss = unrecoverable per-tenant DEKs. ROTATION: shield's `make rotate-kek-{dry,apply}` (in-place re-wrap, no downtime). On uninstall, `make wipe-vault-apply` drops every vs_* table first, then delete VS_KEK from the secret manager.

ui.label: Vibe Shield KEK
ui.helpText: Master key wrapping per-tenant DEKs. Rotate annually or after an incident; never appears in logs.

required.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
required.doc: Commercial Anthropic API key (NOT a Claude.ai consumer key — gateway probes at boot and refuses to start on a consumer key). Inherited from the appliance-wide setting so every Vibe app shares the same key by default.

required.name: ENGINE_URL
required.doc: Internal-only Docker DNS name for the engine. Engine is never exposed via Caddy or the emergency-access proxy.

required.name: GATEWAY_ADMIN_KEY
required.doc: X-Admin-Key for /v1/admin/* routes. Without this set, the admin API refuses every request. Generated once at enable; rotate by editing /opt/vibe/env/vibe-shield.env.

ui.label: Shield admin API key
ui.helpText: X-Admin-Key the admin UI presents on every call.

optional.name: ZDR_ENABLED
optional.doc: Anthropic Zero Data Retention. Requires the ZDR addendum signed on the Anthropic account; the header alone does NOT activate ZDR.

ui.label: Anthropic Zero Data Retention
ui.helpText: Enable only after signing the ZDR addendum with Anthropic.

optional.name: RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE
optional.doc: Default per-(tenant, app) request cap per minute. Per-tenant policy overrides this.

optional.name: SPEND_CAP_MICRODOLLARS
optional.doc: Default per-tenant monthly spend cap in micro-dollars (USD * 1e6). 500_000_000 = $500/month. Per-tenant policy overrides this.

optional.name: ANTHROPIC_REPROBE_INTERVAL_MS
optional.doc: Periodic Anthropic key re-probe interval (ms). 0 disables. Failures log warn; the next /v1/messages call fails-closed via existing 401/503 paths.

optional.name: MAX_REQUEST_BYTES
optional.doc: Max request body size in bytes (default 1 MB).

optional.name: SESSION_TTL_MINUTES
optional.doc: Session idle TTL. Shorter = tighter privacy; longer = better re-id continuity across requests.

optional.name: LOG_LEVEL
optional.doc: Pino log level (fatal | error | warn | info | debug | trace | silent).
